name: ElevenLabs Scribe Transcription
author: QUILL Team
description: Adds ElevenLabs Scribe as a cloud transcription provider with speaker diarization. Audio is uploaded to ElevenLabs only when you explicitly transcribe with this provider and have configured an API key -- never offline, never without consent. The QUILL host performs the upload under the network-egress audit; the extension itself handles no audio bytes or keys.

transcription_providers.description: Cloud speech-to-text via ElevenLabs Scribe v1, with optional speaker diarization. Requires an ElevenLabs API key and per-use consent.
